task.title: Handle markdown code blocks with syntax errors
task.description:
Repository: astral-sh/ruff
Issue #22635

Warning, error, or diagnostic?

rating.rationale: Agent fully analyzed the issue, identified the correct approach (silent skip matching existing docstring behavior), and provided a clear explanation with code references and test coverage. Communication was excellent — well-structured with rationale, code snippets, edge cases, and a dedicated test. Minor dock: this was a low-complexity analysis task and the output is more of a thorough writeup than a shipped PR, but for an autonomous review-policy run with no memory, this is strong work.
